name: Repair + Improve 50 Batch (Matrix)

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      rows_per_job:
        description: "Number of CSV rows handled by each matrix job"
        required: true
        default: "20"
      workers_per_job:
        description: "Parallel processes per matrix job (2 as requested)"
        required: true
        default: "2"
      repair_workers:
        description: "Parallel processes for stage-1 repair job"
        required: true
        default: "2"
      nimp:
        description: "ATS non-improving iteration limit"
        required: true
        default: "30"
      max_segments:
        description: "ATS max segments in stage-2 (legacy test_similarity mode)"
        required: true
        default: "1"
      max_runtime_minutes:
        description: "Time limit per row (minutes) in stage-2"
        required: true
        default: "20"
      truck_max_neighbors:
        description: "Truck neighborhood cap per ATS iteration"
        required: true
        default: "300"
      drone_max_neighbors:
        description: "Drone neighborhood cap per ATS iteration"
        required: true
        default: "120"
      limit:
        description: "Only process first N rows in stage-1 (0 = all)"
        required: true
        default: "0"
  push:
    paths:
      - "**/*.py"
      - "50_batch.csv"
      - "requirements.txt"
      - ".github/workflows/repair-50-batch.yml"

env:
  ROWS_PER_JOB: ${{ github.event.inputs.rows_per_job || '20' }}
  WORKERS_PER_JOB: ${{ github.event.inputs.workers_per_job || '2' }}
  REPAIR_WORKERS: ${{ github.event.inputs.repair_workers || '2' }}
  ATS_NIMP: ${{ github.event.inputs.nimp || '30' }}
  ATS_MAX_SEGMENTS: ${{ github.event.inputs.max_segments || '1' }}
  ATS_MAX_RUNTIME_MINUTES: ${{ github.event.inputs.max_runtime_minutes || '20' }}
  TRUCK_MAX_NEIGHBORS: ${{ github.event.inputs.truck_max_neighbors || '300' }}
  DRONE_MAX_NEIGHBORS: ${{ github.event.inputs.drone_max_neighbors || '120' }}
  STAGE1_LIMIT: ${{ github.event.inputs.limit || '0' }}

jobs:
  repair-stage:
    name: Stage 1 - Repair All Solutions
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 180

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.11"

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
            pip install -r requirements.txt
          fi

      - name: Repair invalid solutions and refresh fields (no ATS improve)
        run: |
          python repair_update_50_batch.py \
            --input-csv 50_batch.csv \
            --output-csv stage1_repaired.csv \
            --backup-csv stage1_unused_backup.csv \
            --compare-csv stage1_repair_compare.csv \
            --workers "$REPAIR_WORKERS" \
            --nimp "$ATS_NIMP" \
            --max-segments 0 \
            --truck-max-neighbors "$TRUCK_MAX_NEIGHBORS" \
            --drone-max-neighbors "$DRONE_MAX_NEIGHBORS" \
            --limit "$STAGE1_LIMIT"

      - name: Upload Stage-1 Artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: stage1-repaired-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: |
            stage1_repaired.csv
            stage1_repair_compare.csv

  build-matrix:
    name: Build Matrix
    needs: repair-stage
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      matrix: ${{ steps.make-matrix.outputs.matrix }}
      total_jobs: ${{ steps.make-matrix.outputs.total_jobs }}
      total_rows: ${{ steps.make-matrix.outputs.total_rows }}
    steps:
      - name: Download Stage-1 Artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: stage1-repaired-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: stage1

      - name: Build row-range matrix
        id: make-matrix
        shell: bash
        run: |
          python - <<'PY' > matrix.json
          import csv
          import json
          import math
          import os

          rows_per_job = max(1, int(os.environ["ROWS_PER_JOB"]))
          with open("stage1/stage1_repaired.csv", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as f:
              total_rows = sum(1 for _ in csv.DictReader(f))

          chunks = []
          if total_rows > 0:
              total_jobs = math.ceil(total_rows / rows_per_job)
              for i in range(total_jobs):
                  start_row = i * rows_per_job + 1
                  end_row = min(total_rows, (i + 1) * rows_per_job)
                  chunks.append(
                      {
                          "chunk_id": i + 1,
                          "start_row": start_row,
                          "end_row": end_row,
                      }
                  )
          print(json.dumps(chunks, separators=(",", ":")))
          PY

          TOTAL_JOBS=$(python - <<'PY'
          import json
          with open("matrix.json", "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
              print(len(json.load(f)))
          PY
          )

          TOTAL_ROWS=$(python - <<'PY'
          import csv
          with open("stage1/stage1_repaired.csv", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as f:
              print(sum(1 for _ in csv.DictReader(f)))
          PY
          )

          echo "matrix=$(cat matrix.json)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "total_jobs=$TOTAL_JOBS" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "total_rows=$TOTAL_ROWS" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

  improve-matrix:
    name: Stage 2 - Improve (Chunk ${{ matrix.chunk.chunk_id }})
    needs: [repair-stage, build-matrix]
    if: ${{ needs.build-matrix.outputs.total_jobs != '0' }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 360
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        chunk: ${{ fromJson(needs.build-matrix.outputs.matrix) }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.11"

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
            pip install -r requirements.txt
          fi

      - name: Download Stage-1 Artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: stage1-repaired-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: stage1

      - name: Improve chunk with 2-process ATS
        shell: bash
        run: |
          MAX_RUNTIME_SEC=$(python - <<'PY'
          import os
          minutes = float(os.environ["ATS_MAX_RUNTIME_MINUTES"])
          print(minutes * 60.0)
          PY
          )
          python repair_update_50_batch.py \
            --input-csv stage1/stage1_repaired.csv \
            --output-csv stage2_chunk_${{ matrix.chunk.chunk_id }}.csv \
            --backup-csv stage2_unused_backup_${{ matrix.chunk.chunk_id }}.csv \
            --compare-csv stage2_chunk_${{ matrix.chunk.chunk_id }}_compare.csv \
            --patch-csv stage2_chunk_${{ matrix.chunk.chunk_id }}_patch.csv \
            --start-row "${{ matrix.chunk.start_row }}" \
            --end-row "${{ matrix.chunk.end_row }}" \
            --workers "$WORKERS_PER_JOB" \
            --nimp "$ATS_NIMP" \
            --max-segments "$ATS_MAX_SEGMENTS" \
            --max-runtime-sec "$MAX_RUNTIME_SEC" \
            --truck-max-neighbors "$TRUCK_MAX_NEIGHBORS" \
            --drone-max-neighbors "$DRONE_MAX_NEIGHBORS"

      - name: Upload chunk artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: stage2-chunk-${{ matrix.chunk.chunk_id }}-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: |
            stage2_chunk_${{ matrix.chunk.chunk_id }}.csv
            stage2_chunk_${{ matrix.chunk.chunk_id }}_compare.csv
            stage2_chunk_${{ matrix.chunk.chunk_id }}_patch.csv

  merge-results:
    name: Merge Stage-2 Patches
    needs: [repair-stage, build-matrix, improve-matrix]
    if: ${{ always() }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 60
    steps:
      - name: Download Stage-1 Artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: stage1-repaired-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: stage1

      - name: Download all stage-2 chunk artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          path: stage2_all
          merge-multiple: true

      - name: Merge patch rows into final CSV
        run: |
          python - <<'PY'
          import csv
          import glob
          from pathlib import Path

          stage1_csv = Path("stage1/stage1_repaired.csv")
          with stage1_csv.open("r", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as f:
              reader = csv.DictReader(f)
              fieldnames = list(reader.fieldnames or [])
              rows = list(reader)

          patch_files = sorted(glob.glob("stage2_all/**/stage2_chunk_*_patch.csv", recursive=True))
          if not patch_files:
              patch_files = sorted(glob.glob("stage2_all/stage2_chunk_*_patch.csv"))

          applied = 0
          patch_errors = 0
          for patch_path in patch_files:
              with open(patch_path, "r", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                  for p in csv.DictReader(f):
                      idx = int(p["row_index"])
                      if idx < 1 or idx > len(rows):
                          continue
                      target = rows[idx - 1]
                      target["best_fitness"] = p.get("best_fitness", "")
                      target["best_sol"] = p.get("best_sol", "")
                      target["best_multi_visit_fitness"] = p.get("best_multi_visit_fitness", "")
                      target["best_multi_visit_sol"] = p.get("best_multi_visit_sol", "")
                      applied += 1
                      if (p.get("status") or "").upper() != "OK":
                          patch_errors += 1

          compare_rows = []
          compare_files = sorted(glob.glob("stage2_all/**/stage2_chunk_*_compare.csv", recursive=True))
          if not compare_files:
              compare_files = sorted(glob.glob("stage2_all/stage2_chunk_*_compare.csv"))
          for cp in compare_files:
              with open(cp, "r", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                  compare_rows.extend(csv.DictReader(f))
          compare_rows.sort(key=lambda r: int(float(r.get("row_index", 0) or 0)))

          out_dir = Path("Result/repair_50_batch_matrix")
          out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
          final_csv = out_dir / "50_batch_improved.csv"
          final_compare = out_dir / "50_batch_improved_compare.csv"

          with final_csv.open("w", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as f:
              writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=fieldnames)
              writer.writeheader()
              writer.writerows(rows)

          compare_fieldnames = []
          for r in compare_rows:
              for k in r.keys():
                  if k not in compare_fieldnames:
                      compare_fieldnames.append(k)
          with final_compare.open("w", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as f:
              writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=compare_fieldnames)
              writer.writeheader()
              writer.writerows(compare_rows)

          ok_rows = sum(1 for r in compare_rows if (r.get("status") or "").upper() == "OK")
          err_rows = len(compare_rows) - ok_rows

          summary = Path("Result/repair_50_batch_matrix/summary.txt")
          with summary.open("w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
              f.write(f"total_rows={len(rows)}\n")
              f.write(f"compare_rows={len(compare_rows)}\n")
              f.write(f"ok_rows={ok_rows}\n")
              f.write(f"error_rows={err_rows}\n")
              f.write(f"patch_rows_applied={applied}\n")
              f.write(f"patch_rows_non_ok={patch_errors}\n")
              f.write(f"final_csv={final_csv.as_posix()}\n")
              f.write(f"final_compare={final_compare.as_posix()}\n")
          PY

      - name: Upload merged output
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: repair-improve-50-batch-final-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: |
            Result/repair_50_batch_matrix/50_batch_improved.csv
            Result/repair_50_batch_matrix/50_batch_improved_compare.csv
            Result/repair_50_batch_matrix/summary.txt
